What can DocOS AI do?

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
ATS Resume Optimizer\r\n

Make your resume ATS-friendly with clean formatting, proper keywords, and standard sections

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Professional Formatting\r\n

Apply consistent fonts, headings, spacing, and styles to your entire document

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Document Cleanup\r\n

Remove extra spaces, fix formatting issues, standardize styles

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Find & Replace\r\n

Smart search and replace with pattern matching across your document

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Tables & Lists\r\n

Create formatted tables, bullet lists, and numbered lists

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Templates\r\n

Generate resumes, cover letters, business letters, meeting notes

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
AI Writing Assistant\r\n

Improve writing, change tone, summarize, expand content

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
Proofreading\r\n

Check grammar, spelling, punctuation, and style consistency

\r\n
\r\n
\r\n
\r\n

Just describe what you need in plain English — DocOS handles the rest.
